//: Dedicated tsconfig for preload type-level tests (*.test-d.ts). The main desktop tsconfig excludes __tests__ directories; this config includes the window-api type tests together with the global augmentation they verify. Requires lib: ["DOM"] so Window is available in the tsc program; all other settings inherit from the base. Pointed to by vitest.config.ts typecheck.tsconfig so tsc actually checks these files.
